tech: Hardware Setup, Software Installation, Network Configuration, Lab Maintenance
title: B. P. I. Innovation Lab
description: Set up and maintained the Innovation Lab at Bogura Polytechnic Institute. Work included installing and configuring computer hardware, setting up software development environments, establishing local network infrastructure, and providing ongoing maintenance for the lab used by students for software and hardware projects.

images.title: Lab Setup
images.desc: Complete computer lab layout with workstation arrangement.

images.title: Computers
images.desc: Configured desktop computers with pre-installed software.

images.title: Network
images.desc: Lab network infrastructure with cabling and switch setup.
